title: Labor Day Holiday — May 1, 2025
body: The office will be closed on May 1, 2025 in observance of Labor Day. Employees on field work or with client commitments should coordinate with their managers. Work completed on this holiday will be subject to holiday pay premiums per DOLE guidelines.
author: HR Department

title: Q2 2025 Company Town Hall — May 16
body: Our Q2 Town Hall will be held on May 16, 2025 at 10:00 AM via Zoom. The CEO will discuss company performance, upcoming projects, and answer your questions. Attendance is encouraged. Zoom link will be sent via email.
author: Admin Team

title: Updated HMO Annual Limit — Effective June 2025
body: We are pleased to announce that our HMO annual limit will increase from ₱200,000 to ₱250,000 effective June 1, 2025. This applies to all regular employees on the Executive Plus plan. Dependent coverage limits are also increased proportionally.
author: HR Department

title: May Payroll Cutoff Schedule
body: Payroll cutoff for May 1–15, 2025 will be on May 15 at 5:00 PM. All overtime and reimbursement claims must be submitted before the deadline. Late submissions will be processed in the next cutoff period.
author: Payroll Team

title: Hybrid Work Policy Update — May 2025
body: Effective May 5, 2025, the WFH policy is updated to 3 WFH days per week for Level 3 and above. Employees must log their WFH days through the portal. Please review the full policy document in the Documents section.
author: HR Department

title: Mental Health Awareness Month — May Activities
body: In celebration of Mental Health Awareness Month, HR has organized free counseling sessions, webinars, and wellness activities throughout May. Check your company email for the schedule. Participation is voluntary but encouraged.
author: HR Department

title: IT Security Reminder — Phishing Awareness
body: The IT team has observed an increase in phishing emails targeting company accounts. Please do not click suspicious links. If you receive a suspicious email, forward it immediately to security@hris-demo.ph. Never share your credentials via email.
author: IT Department
